Venom Technologies © 2024 All Rights ReservedPrivacy PolicyTerms & conditionsCookies

Privacy Policy for Venom Technologies

At Venom Technologies, we respect the privacy of our users and are committed to protecting their personal information. This Privacy Policy outlines the information we collect, how it is used, and how it is protected.


Information Collection and Use:

  • Personal Information: We may collect personal information such as name, email address, and phone number when you create an account or subscribe to our services. This information is used to provide and improve our services, communicate with you, and fulfill your requests.
  • Blockchain Transactions: As a blockchain company, we collect transaction data related to the use of our services. This data may include the amounts, addresses, and timestamps of transactions. This information is used to maintain the integrity and security of our services and to comply with regulatory requirements.
  • Log Data: When you use our services, we may collect log data such as your IP address, browser type, operating system, and the pages you visit. This information is used to diagnose and resolve technical issues, to improve our services, and for security purposes.

How we use Cookies:

  • Essential Cookies: These cookies are essential for the functioning of our website and cannot be disabled. They include cookies that allow you to log into your account and make transactions on our platform.
  • Performance Cookies: These cookies collect information about how you use our website, such as the pages you visit and the time spent on the site. This information is used to improve the performance and functionality of our website.
  • Functionality Cookies: These cookies remember your preferences, such as language preference, and allow us to provide a more personalized experience.
  • Third-Party Cookies: We may use third-party service providers, such as Google Analytics, to collect and analyze information about your use of our website. These providers may use their own cookies and similar technologies to collect and store information about your activities on our website.

Data Security:

We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect the security of your information. This includes using encryption, firewalls, and secure storage to prevent unauthorized access and data breaches.

Contact Us:

If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at info@venomtech.io.


Effective Date: February 8, 2024.

Terms and Conditions for Venom Technologies

Welcome to Venom Technologies, a blockchain technology company. The following terms and conditions (“Terms”) govern your use of our services and website. By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms.


1 1. Use of Services:

You may only use our services for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. You agree not to use our services for any unauthorized or illegal activities, including but not limited to, money laundering, fraud, or other criminal activities.

1 2. Account Creation:

To use our services, you may be required to create an account. You agree to provide accurate and complete information when creating your account and to keep your account information up- to-date. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account information and are fully responsible for all activities that occur under your account.

1 3. Transactions:

Our services allow you to make blockchain transactions, including but not limited to, sending and receiving digital assets. You are responsible for ensuring the accuracy of all transactions and for any consequences resulting from your transactions.

1 4. Security:

You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account information and for the security of your private keys. We recommend that you use a secure device and keep your private keys offline. If you suspect that your account information has been compromised, you should immediately contact us at security@venomtech.com.

1 5. Intellectual Property:

Our services, including but not limited to, our website, software, and branding are protected by intellectual property laws. You agree not to reproduce, duplicate, copy, sell, trade, or exploit our services for any commercial purposes.

1 6. Disclaimer of Warranty:

Our services are provided on an “as is” and “as available” basis. We do not make any representations or warranties of any kind, express or implied, as to the operation of our services or the information, content, materials, or products included on our website.

1 7. Limitation of Liability:

In no event will we be liable for any damages, including but not limited to, direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages, arising out of the use of our services or the inability to use our services.

1 8. Governing Law:

These Terms and your use of our services will be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which we are incorporated, without giving effect to any principles of conflicts of law.

1 9. Changes to Terms:

We may update these Terms from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or applicable laws. Any changes will be posted on our website and we will notify you of any significant changes by email.

1 10. Contact Us:

If you have any questions or concerns about these Terms, please contact us at info@venomtech.io.


Effective Date: February 8, 2024.

Cookies Policy for Venom Technologies

At Venom Technologies, we use cookies and similar technologies to improve and personalize your experience on our website. This Cookies Policy explains what cookies are, how they are used, and how you can control their use.


What are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They allow the website to remember your actions and preferences, such as login information and language preference, over a period of time.

How to Control Cookies:

Most browsers allow you to control the use of cookies through their settings. You can block cookies, delete existing cookies, or receive a warning before a cookie is stored. However, disabling cookies may impact the functionality of our website and your ability to use certain features.

Changes to this Policy:

We may update this Cookies Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or applicable laws. Any changes will be posted on this page and we will notify you of any significant changes by email.

Contact Us:

If you have any questions or concerns about this Cookies Policy, please contact us at info@venomtech.io.


Effective Date: February 8, 2024.
